input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.8.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.8.1
            TITLE: inspection items

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.8.1: Inspection Items
IN.8.1 Inspection Items 
The following items must be brought to Mechanical Technical Inspection: 
• Vehicle on Dry Tires  V.4.3.1 
• Technical Inspection Form 
• Push Bar  VE.2.2 
• Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet (SES) – electronic copy  F.2.1 
• Monocoque Laminate Test Specimens (if applicable)  F.4.3 
• The Impact Attenuator that was tested (if applicable)  F.8.8.7 
• Accumulator Container samples (EV only) (if applicable)  F.10.2.1.c,  F.10.2.2.c
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 113 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
• Electronic copies of any submitted Rules Questions with the received answer  GR.7

final_answer: Inspection Items The following items must be brought to Mechanical Technical Inspection: • Vehicle on Dry Tires V.4.3.1 • Technical Inspection Form • Push Bar VE.2.2 • Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet (SES) – electronic copy F.2.1 • Monocoque Laminate Test Specimens (if applicable) F.4.3 • The Impact Attenuator that was tested (if applicable) F.8.8.7 • Accumulator Container samples (EV only) (if applicable) F.10.2.1.c, F.10.2.2.c Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International Page 113 of 140 Version 1.0 1 Sep 2023 • Electronic copies of any submitted Rules Questions with the received answer GR.7
